details.test: Task 1: Configure cheapest qualifying VM plan in us_east
Task 2: Create auto-scaling group 2-5 instances in eu_west
Task 3: Create High-severity CPU alert for production service
Task 4: Build Service Health dashboard with CPU, error, latency widgets
Task 5: Choose cheapest managed DB with >=2 vCPUs, >=100GB, backups, <=$200
Task 6: Configure daily 02:00 backup policy with 30-day retention for VM
Task 7: Pricing estimate for 3 VMs, 1 DB, 1 LB under $500/month
Task 8: Enable anomaly detection for payment logs (14d, high sensitivity)
Task 9: Create incident rule for HTTP 5xx >5% for 5m assigned to SRE
